1778070.name: ReFactory Soundtrack
1778070.description:
Imagine that you are in the middle of space. You about to experience an adventure that you cannot imagine. You are the AI of a crashed ship on a planet rich in resources. Your task is to find the missing crew of the ship. No doubt your colony's growth will attract unwanted guests,
but what can't you do to save the crew?
... and this Music Mix is just perfect for your mission. To build and to survive on unknown planet. So let's go!
